query:
SELECT
                c.id as entity_id,
                c.name,
                regexp_replace(
                    c.name,
                    $6,
                    '<macro_em>\1</macro_em>',
                    'gi'
                ) as name_highlighted,
                c."updatedAt" as updated_at
            FROM "Chat" c
            WHERE c.id = ANY($1)
                AND c."deletedAt" IS NULL
                AND c.name ILIKE $2
                AND (
                    $4::timestamptz IS NULL
                    OR (c."updatedAt", c.id) < ($4, $5)
                )
            ORDER BY c."updatedAt" DESC, c.id DESC
            LIMIT $3
